Notes: FACT. Procedure Step 2.2 requires structural coordination before demolition drawings are issued. Guidance P-003 reinforces early structural coordination for mezzanine.

Statement: PKG-003 (Mechanical), PKG-004 (Electrical), PKG-006 (Plumbing) must agree on division of MEP demolition scope to avoid gaps or duplication.

Notes: FACT. Procedure Step 2.3 and prerequisites table list coordination inputs from PKG-003/004/006 as required. Guidance C-005 reinforces.

Statement: Hazardous materials assessment required (or documented waiver) before Phase 2 demolition design can commence. Procedure Step 1.3a is a formal hold point.
EvidenceQuote: Before proceeding to Phase 2, confirm that the hazardous materials assessment decision has been resolved
Notes: FACT. Procedure Step 1.3a is a formal HOLD POINT gating Phase 2. Guidance C-004 identifies hazmat risk for existing buildings.
